content_body:
Our nation's favorite holiday is just about a week away, and Blue Ridge is the perfect place to spend the long weekend! This patriotic weekend is the perfect opportunity to enjoy some family fun, remember those who have served for our country, and celebrate freedom! Here are the best ways to spend the Fourth of July in North Georgia:

First things first, reserve your luxury cabin! Ranging from two to five bedrooms, our properties offer top-of-the-line amenities whether you wish to relax in the cabin or enjoy it after a day of adventure. Visit our availability calendar to find the perfect cabin for your group!

Aside from the usual summer fun in Blue Ridge (see our favorite summer activities here!), there are so many special events for the holiday! Grumpy Old Men Brewing Co. will be hosting live music and food trucks on July 2nd at 1pm, so enjoy a freshly brewed beer and outdoor games with your best friends and family while enjoying a mini-concert.

For those with little ones who are craving exploration, check out the Wild West Show and Rodeo on the River in McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN on June 30th and July 1st at 7:30pm! Enjoy North Georgia's version of a rodeo with all the classic events, and stay for the Copper Basin fireworks show on July 1st at 9:30pm! 

Downtown Blue Ridge, GA hosts The Old Timer's Parade, which has been a Blue Ridge tradition since the 1950’s. From 10am-12pm anyone can participate in the parade! Bring your antique vehicles, dress in period attire OR not, it is up to you. If you, your organization, your business, your church, etc would like to participate in the parade contact Pam Fink and she will answer all your questions.

If you are staying in North Georgia for July 4th, enjoy the Lake Blue Ridge Fireworks show on Tuesday at 9:30pm which happens at the Lake Blue Ridge Marina! Watch from the Lake Blue Ridge TVA Dam, Lake Blue Ridge Marina, Morganton Point Recreation Area, or from your boat! See the beautiful fireworks shimmer over the water with their reflections and turn on your favorite country playlist to set the mood.

Let freedom ring in Blue Ridge and make some summer memories in North Georgia this weekend! Reserve one of our luxury cabins online or with our reservation specialists at (706) 432-2140!
title: How to Spend Independence Day in Blue Ridge, GA
